report.indication: Cough in a 4-year-old child, no fever.
report.technique: Single AP view of the chest.
report.findings: Lungs are clear bilaterally. No focal consolidation, effusion, or pneumothorax. Cardiothymic silhouette is normal for age. Bony thorax is intact.
report.impression:
1. Normal paediatric chest radiograph.
2. No evidence of pneumonia.
